explanation: This property states that globally, if an HELLO message is sent by the Local Node, then it must have been preceded by the Local Node having simultaneously queried the Link Set, Neighbor Set, and MPR Set components. This directly captures the requirement that an error occurs if an HELLO message is exchanged without this chain of operations, ensuring all necessary queries precede the message exchange.
decision2: if bool_exp3 holds, then it must have been the case that bool_exp4 has occurred before bool_exp3 holds
decision1_substring: This property holds for every DM_i.
decision2_substring: Local Node—before generating the message—must query the Link Set, Neighbor Set, and MPR Set components. An error occurs if an HELLO message is exchanged without this chain of operations.
output_structured_natural_language: Globally, if hello_msg_sent_local_node_to_dmi holds, then it must have been the case that local_node_queried_link_set & local_node_queried_neighbor_set & local_node_queried_mpr_set has occurred before hello_msg_sent_local_node_to_dmi holds
